---
title: "My Awesome Paper Title"
author: "Your Name"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
---

## Abstract
This is a single-file Quarto website. 

## Methodology
You can include math like $E = mc^2$ and even your Babylon.js code here.

```{=html}
<canvas id="renderCanvas" style="width: 100%; height: 400px;"></canvas>
